backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining capsule types (love/prediction), storage for capsules/feedback/user profiles, access control mixins, and core business logic including claim code normalization and verification.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the addition of Google AdSense verification script to frontend/index.html with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend source files including components, pages, hooks, and utilities with their key functionality and relationships.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH-based color system defining light and dark mode CSS variables for the application theme.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with Google site verification meta tag and AdSense script already present in the head section.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component managing routing, page state, React Query setup, domain verification, backend health banner, and reminder notifications.
frontend/src/components/BackendHealthBan: Alert banner component that displays a warning when backend health check fails, hidden when loading or healthy.
frontend/src/components/CountdownTimer.t: Real-time countdown display component showing days/hours/minutes/seconds until target time with auto-refresh and optional completion callback.
frontend/src/components/DomainVerificati: Security component that validates the current domain against allowed list, attempts auto-redirect to official domain, and displays full-screen warning on unauthorized domains.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright, caffeine.ai attribution, and navigation buttons for Feedback, Privacy & Safety, and Security pages.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Header component with logo, desktop/mobile navigation menus for Home, Open Capsule, My Capsules, Verify, and Security pages, plus OfficialLinkBanner integration.
frontend/src/components/OfficialLinkBann: Banner component displaying the official CapsuleVault URL with a copy-to-clipboard button and shield icon for security verification.
frontend/src/components/ReminderToggle.t: Component for toggling capsule unlock reminders with notification permission handling, supporting both button and inline variants, and storing reminders for 24h and 1h before unlock.
frontend/src/components/VerifiedBadge.ts: Badge component displaying verification status with shield and check icons, showing official CapsuleVault URL and integrity hash in a tooltip.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook managing backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, handling anonymous and authenticated actors, and invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient configuration with delegation handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for backend operations including capsule creation, retrieval, verification, feedback submission, and backend health checks with claim code normalization and timestamp generation utilities.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a soft, calming color palette for light and dark modes, including primary, secondary, accent, and chart colors with blue-purple tones.
frontend/src/lib/reminders.ts: Local reminder system for capsule unlocks that manages localStorage-based reminders, tracks notification states (24h, 1h, unlock), requests browser notification permissions, and checks for upcoming capsule unlock times.
frontend/src/lib/vaultKey.ts: Vault Key utilities for generating random VK-xxxxxxxx keys, hashing them with SHA-256, and managing them in localStorage for capsule access control.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication context.
frontend/src/pages/CapsuleViewPage.tsx: Displays an unlocked capsule's content with metadata including type (love/prediction), category, unlock date, time locked duration, and security reminders with verified badge.
Receipt page shown after capsule creation that displays the claim code with copy, share, and download backup functionality, including official site verification messaging.
frontend/src/pages/CreateCapsulePage.tsx: Multi-step form for creating time-locked capsules (love messages or predictions) with category selection, content input, unlock date/time picker, optional reminders, and backend health validation before submission.
frontend/src/pages/FeedbackPage.tsx: Feedback submission and display page with rate limiting (1 per minute), device ID tracking, and filtering to show only approved feedback with timestamps.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page with hero section, navigation buttons to create/open capsules, capsule type cards (Message and Prediction), and ad placeholders.
frontend/src/pages/MyCapsules.tsx: Displays user's capsules filtered by vault key hash with export functionality to download claim codes and metadata as a text file.
frontend/src/pages/OpenCapsulePage.tsx: Claim code entry page that validates and normalizes codes, checks capsule expiry status, displays countdown timer for locked capsules, and handles navigation to view unlocked capsules.
frontend/src/pages/SafetyPrivacyPage.tsx: Informational page explaining CapsuleVault's privacy model (no accounts, private claim codes), responsible use guidelines, and security features.
frontend/src/pages/SecurityPage.tsx: React component displaying security information and verification steps for CapsuleVault, including the official URL, copy functionality, and warnings about fake sites.
frontend/src/pages/VerifyCapsulePage.tsx: React component for verifying capsule claim codes, displaying capsule metadata (unlock date, creation date) and verification status using the useGetCapsule hook.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme settings, animations, and plugins for typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking Google AdSense integration feature request (client ID ca-pub-7830122739302232) with schema version 1.0.0 and project state version 3.
